prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap, eV
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting – exact four-center integrals) in PySCF 2.5
Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz (path: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz); single-point only (no re-optimization)
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet)
SCF convergence: converged in 10 cycles
Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine
Live log: the run was streamed to frontier_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out in the working directory (path echoed at launch in the session)

Result
• HOMO energy = −7.2525992 eV
• LUMO energy = −1.112786 eV
→ Frontier-orbital (HOMO–LUMO) gap = 6.1398131 eV

This value was obtained with the chemkit “frontier-orbitals” skill using the command recorded in the JSON (see cli_invocation), ensuring full reproducibility. The calculation’s integrity checks passed (integrity.trustworthy = true), and the engine reported no warnings.
